query:
SELECT 
  fullName,
  email,
  team,
  sportsDayProfile,
  profileTagline,
  teamIdentityMessage
FROM sports_day_registrations
WHERE fullName IN ('Charlotte', 'Ryan', 'Nat', 'Kwabs')
LIMIT 10;
